center.name: 杜蘭戈州
center.summary: 杜蘭戈州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括蓝喉宝石蜂鸟、庫柏鷹、White-striped woodcreeper等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Grace's warblers breed from the south-western United States to Nicaragua and winter in their breeding range from north-eastern Sinaloa and north-western Durango south

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: pallidus is found in central Sinaloa, western Durango and southwards to Jalisco and Michoacán; P

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: One is found in the northwest in southwestern Chihuahua and Durango

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: umbrosus is found in northwestern Mexico from Sonora and Chihuahua south to Durango, Nayarit, and Jalisco

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Digital distribution maps of the birds of the Western Hemisphere. Cooper's hawks can be found across the entirety of the contiguous United States at some part of the year, excepting the northernmost region of Maine. Their breeding range terminates along the Gulf Coast and south Florida, and south of the Rio Grande, excepting their Mexican breeding range consisting of northern Baja California, the mountains from eastern Sonora and Chihuahua to Durango, also recently in northern Coahuila, formerly east into Nuevo Leon and south to Michoacán and possibly still in Guerrero.Howell, S

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|right|The tufted jay can be found in pine-oak forests within Sierra Madre Occidental.|alt=An epiphyte-covered oak tree surrounded by pine trees The tufted jay is endemic to Mexico and is only found in a limited range within the Sierra Madre Occidental, in an area of roughly . Within this mountain range, they can be found in eastern Sinaloa, western Durango, and northern Nayarit. This species is most often found at elevations of , but has been found as low as and as high as . The tufted jay inhabits forests throughout its range

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Sinaloa crow is found in western Mexico from southern Sonora south to southwestern Nayarit and east into western Durango
